text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Tosen Jordan receives an interview
request.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Isn't my signature racewear just the cutest thing
ever?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats patent leather, right? The slit in
the skirt and the glitter are fire too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're doing a shoot in your signature racewear?
Looking good!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, praise from an actual model! Sweating the
details really paid off!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You really stressed over it, huh? I bet you put
more thought into your racewear than your
homework.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know it! I used my whole life's allotment of
brainpower!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Tosen Jordan, we'd like to start the
interview.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay! Time to go out there and nail it!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Can we get one more photo?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How about this? I feel like a legit model!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we got some really great pics! And your
racewear looks fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Can we get some shots of you running next?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Like, actually running?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The thing is... I kind of did my bangs today. Let's
just skip the running stuff, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, all right...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: So running photos are off the table?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text: Well, she's a modern kid, after all. Sooo... yeah.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm beat. Finally finished.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What? It's not that... It just sucks to mess up your
bangs, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but I'd probably look pretty cringe
looking all serious while I ran.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's not the real reason, is it? You're not a
good liar.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: City...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know, it's just... there's something about it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I really like this signature racewear. Like I said
before, I put tons of thought into it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I'm the one wearing it, right? It's, like, just... me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Argh! I can't explain it well...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know, you're getting yourself too nervous.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That signature racewear isn't something just
anyone who runs can wear, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that her signature racewear is the proof
of her hard work and good results. Just getting it
is a great achievement and something to be
proud of.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're, like, a little too excited. That's pretty
cringe too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But... maybe it was even more cringe that I didn't
run.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Tosen Jordan?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! You're back!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to bother you, but I'd really like to get a
few shots of you running... There are definitely
fans who want to see you in action!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: People... really want to see that?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't put any weird pressure on me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But... these reporters did come all the way out
here. I guess I should give everyone something.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna slay out there, so make sure you get
some good shots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She no longer shows any sign of fear. Having
poured out her feelings, Tosen Jordan is left only
with an absolute refusal to be defeated.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! There's no way I'm gonna be lame out
there! I literally just said I didn't want anyone to
see that side of me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah... So you're doing it, then?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I guess I might as well.
Hey! I'm gonna run now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Illuminated by the setting sun, the glitter of
Jordan's signature racewear leaves a shimmering
trail of light. Not a single person is laughing as we
watch her run.
